tldr: This paper proposes a meta-learning based framework for estimating time-varying disturbances in robotics, using a unified representation and feedback calibration for online adaptation. It demonstrates effectiveness on quadrotor flight experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于元学习的框架，用于估计机器人中随时间变化的扰动，使用统一的表示和反馈校准进行在线自适应。它在四旋翼飞行实验中证明了有效性。
summary_zh: 现代机器人应用中，由于未知的时变扰动，精确控制始终是一个开放性问题。 现有的基于元学习的方法需要对环境结构进行共享表示，这缺乏对现实中非结构性扰动的灵活性。此外，表示误差和分布偏移会导致预测精度严重下降。 本文提出了一种可泛化的扰动估计框架，该框架建立在元学习和反馈校准的在线自适应之上。 通过从过去观测值的有限时间窗口中提取特征，可以学习一种能够有效捕获一般非结构性扰动的统一表示，而无需预定义的结构假设。随后，在线自适应过程通过状态反馈机制进行校准，以衰减源自表示和泛化局限性的学习残差。 理论分析表明，可以实现在线学习误差和扰动估计误差的同时收敛。 通过统一的元表示，我们的框架能够有效地估计多个快速变化的扰动，四旋翼飞行实验验证了这一点。 项目页面提供视频、补充材料和代码：https://nonstructural-metalearn.github.io。

title: Optimizing Control-Friendly Trajectories with Self-Supervised Residual Learning
summary: Real-world physics can only be analytically modeled with a certain level of precision for modern intricate robotic systems. As a result, tracking aggressive trajectories accurately could be challenging due to the existence of residual physics during controller synthesis. This paper presents a self-supervised residual learning and trajectory optimization framework to address the aforementioned challenges. At first, unknown dynamic effects on the closed-loop model are learned and treated as residuals of the nominal dynamics, jointly forming a hybrid model. We show that learning with analytic gradients can be achieved using only trajectory-level data while enjoying accurate long-horizon prediction with an arbitrary integration step size. Subsequently, a trajectory optimizer is developed to compute the optimal reference trajectory with the residual physics along it minimized. It ends up with trajectories that are friendly to the following control level. The agile flight of quadrotors illustrates that by utilizing the hybrid dynamics, the proposed optimizer outputs aggressive motions that can be precisely tracked.
tldr: This paper introduces a self-supervised residual learning framework for trajectory optimization in robotics, enabling the generation of control-friendly trajectories by learning and minimizing unknown dynamic effects. It shows improved trajectory tracking results on quadrotors.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于机器人轨迹优化的自监督残差学习框架，通过学习和最小化未知的动力学效应，从而生成控制友好的轨迹。在四旋翼飞行器上的实验表明，该方法可以提高轨迹跟踪的精度。
summary_zh: 对于现代复杂的机器人系统，现实世界的物理现象只能以一定的精度进行解析建模。因此，由于控制器综合过程中残余物理现象的存在，精确跟踪激进轨迹可能具有挑战性。本文提出了一种自监督残差学习和轨迹优化框架，以应对上述挑战。首先，闭环模型上未知的动力学影响被学习并视为名义动力学的残差，共同构成一个混合模型。我们证明了仅使用轨迹级别的数据，通过解析梯度进行学习是可行的，同时还能以任意积分步长实现精确的长时程预测。随后，开发了一个轨迹优化器来计算最优参考轨迹，并使其沿轨迹的残差物理量最小化。最终生成的轨迹对于后续控制层更加友好。四旋翼飞行器的敏捷飞行表明，通过利用混合动力学，所提出的优化器能够输出可以被精确跟踪的激进行动。

title: Learning to Nudge: A Scalable Barrier Function Framework for Safe Robot Interaction in Dense Clutter
summary: Robots operating in everyday environments must navigate and manipulate within densely cluttered spaces, where physical contact with surrounding objects is unavoidable. Traditional safety frameworks treat contact as unsafe, restricting robots to collision avoidance and limiting their ability to function in dense, everyday settings. As the number of objects grows, model-based approaches for safe manipulation become computationally intractable; meanwhile, learned methods typically tie safety to the task at hand, making them hard to transfer to new tasks without retraining. In this work we introduce Dense Contact Barrier Functions(DCBF). Our approach bypasses the computational complexity of explicitly modeling multi-object dynamics by instead learning a composable, object-centric function that implicitly captures the safety constraints arising from physical interactions. Trained offline on interactions with a few objects, the learned DCBFcomposes across arbitrary object sets at runtime, producing a single global safety filter that scales linearly and transfers across tasks without retraining. We validate our approach through simulated experiments in dense clutter, demonstrating its ability to enable collision-free navigation and safe, contact-rich interaction in suitable settings.
tldr: This paper introduces Dense Contact Barrier Functions (DCBF), a learned, composable safety filter that enables robots to navigate and manipulate safely in dense, cluttered environments without extensive retraining across different tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为密集接触障碍函数 (DCBF) 的学习型、可组合的安全过滤器，使机器人在密集的杂乱环境中安全地导航和操作，而无需在不同任务中进行大量重新训练。
summary_zh: 在日常环境中运行的机器人必须在拥挤的空间中导航和操作，在那里与周围物体的物理接触是不可避免的。传统的安全框架将接触视为不安全因素，限制机器人进行避撞，并限制了它们在密集、日常环境中发挥作用的能力。随着物体数量的增加，基于模型的安全操作方法在计算上变得难以处理；与此同时，学习到的方法通常将安全性与手头的任务联系起来，使得它们难以转移到新任务，需要重新训练。在这项工作中，我们引入了密集接触障碍函数（DCBF）。我们的方法通过学习一个可组合的、以对象为中心的函数来隐式地捕获由物理交互产生的安全约束，从而绕过显式建模多对象动力学的计算复杂性。DCBF经过离线训练与少量对象的交互后，可以在运行时跨任意对象集进行组合，产生一个单一的全局安全滤波器，该滤波器线性扩展并在任务之间转移，无需重新训练。我们通过在密集杂物中的模拟实验验证了我们的方法，证明了它能够在合适的设置中实现无碰撞导航和安全的、富含接触的交互。

title: Effective Online 3D Bin Packing with Lookahead Parcels Using Monte Carlo Tree Search
summary: Online 3D Bin Packing (3D-BP) with robotic arms is crucial for reducing transportation and labor costs in modern logistics. While Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has shown strong performance, it often fails to adapt to real-world short-term distribution shifts, which arise as different batches of goods arrive sequentially, causing performance drops. We argue that the short-term lookahead information available in modern logistics systems is key to mitigating this issue, especially during distribution shifts. We formulate online 3D-BP with lookahead parcels as a Model Predictive Control (MPC) problem and adapt the Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) framework to solve it. Our framework employs a dynamic exploration prior that automatically balances a learned RL policy and a robust random policy based on the lookahead characteristics. Additionally, we design an auxiliary reward to penalize long-term spatial waste from individual placements. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving over 10\% gains under distributional shifts, 4\% average improvement in online deployment, and up to more than 8\% in the best case--demonstrating the effectiveness of our framework.
tldr: The paper introduces an MCTS-based approach for online 3D bin packing, leveraging lookahead parcel information to address distribution shifts and improve performance over DRL methods in real-world logistics scenarios.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种基于MCTS的在线3D装箱方法，利用前瞻包裹信息来解决分布偏移问题，并提高在现实物流场景中相对于DRL方法的性能。
summary_zh: 基于机械臂的在线三维装箱（3D-BP）对于降低现代物流中的运输和劳动力成本至关重要。尽管深度强化学习（DRL）表现出强大的性能，但它常常无法适应现实世界中的短期分布偏移，这种偏移是由陆续到达的不同批次货物引起的，从而导致性能下降。我们认为，现代物流系统中可用的短期前瞻信息是缓解此问题的关键，尤其是在分布偏移期间。我们将带有前瞻包裹的在线三维装箱问题建模为模型预测控制（MPC）问题，并调整蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）框架来解决它。我们的框架采用一种动态探索先验，根据前瞻特征自动平衡学习到的RL策略和稳健的随机策略。此外，我们设计了一种辅助奖励，用于惩罚个体放置带来的长期空间浪费。在真实数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法始终优于最先进的基线方法，在分布偏移下实现了超过10%的增益，在线部署中平均提高了4%，最佳情况下甚至超过8%——证明了我们框架的有效性。

title: Making Infeasible Tasks Feasible: Planning to Reconfigure Disconnected 3D Environments with Movable Objects
summary: Several planners have been developed to compute dynamically feasible, collision-free robot paths from an initial to a goal configuration. A key assumption in these works is that the goal region is reachable; an assumption that often fails in practice when environments are disconnected. Motivated by this limitation, we consider known 3D environments comprising objects, also called blocks, that form distinct navigable support surfaces (planes), and that are either non-movable (e.g., tables) or movable (e.g., boxes). These surfaces may be mutually disconnected due to height differences, holes, or lateral separations. Our focus is on tasks where the robot must reach a goal region residing on an elevated plane that is unreachable. Rather than declaring such tasks infeasible, an effective strategy is to enable the robot to interact with the environment, rearranging movable objects to create new traversable connections; a problem known as Navigation Among Movable Objects (NAMO). Existing NAMO planners typically address 2D environments, where obstacles are pushed aside to clear a path. These methods cannot directly handle the considered 3D setting; in such cases, obstacles must be placed strategically to bridge these physical disconnections. We address this challenge by developing BRiDGE (Block-based Reconfiguration in Disconnected 3D Geometric Environments), a sampling-based planner that incrementally builds trees over robot and object configurations to compute feasible plans specifying which objects to move, where to place them, and in what order, while accounting for a limited number of movable objects. To accelerate planning, we introduce non-uniform sampling strategies. We show that our method is probabilistically complete and we provide extensive numerical and hardware experiments validating its effectiveness.
tldr: This paper presents BRiDGE, a sampling-based planner for reconfiguring 3D environments with movable objects to enable robot navigation across disconnected support surfaces, addressing the limitations of existing Navigation Among Movable Objects (NAMO) planners.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出BRiDGE，一种基于采样的规划器，用于通过移动可移动物体来重新配置3D环境，从而实现机器人跨断开的支持表面进行导航，解决了现有可移动物体导航 (NAMO) 规划器的局限性。
summary_zh: 已经开发出多种规划器，用以计算从初始配置到目标配置的动力学可行、无碰撞的机器人路径。这些工作的一个关键假设是目标区域是可达的；但在实际中，当环境是不连通时，这个假设常常失效。鉴于这种局限性，我们考虑包含物体的已知3D环境，这些物体也叫做块，它们形成不同的可导航支撑面（平面），并且要么是不可移动的（例如，桌子），要么是可移动的（例如，箱子）。由于高度差、孔洞或横向分隔，这些表面可能是互不连通的。我们的重点是机器人必须到达位于不可达的高架平面上的目标区域的任务。与其宣布此类任务不可行，不如采取一种有效的策略，使机器人能够与环境交互，重新安排可移动物体以创建新的可通行连接；这是一个被称为在可移动物体间的导航（NAMO）的问题。现有的NAMO规划器通常处理2D环境，其中障碍物被推到一边以清除路径。这些方法无法直接处理所考虑的3D设置；在这种情况下，必须有策略地放置障碍物，以桥接这些物理断连。我们通过开发BRiDGE（在不连通的3D几何环境中基于块的重构），来应对这一挑战。BRiDGE是一种基于采样的规划器，它在机器人和物体配置上增量构建树，以计算可行的规划，这些规划指定要移动哪些物体、将它们放置在何处以及以什么顺序放置它们，同时考虑有限数量的可移动物体。为了加速规划，我们引入了非均匀采样策略。我们证明了我们的方法在概率上是完备的，并提供了广泛的数值和硬件实验来验证其有效性。

title: Learning and Optimizing the Efficacy of Spatio-Temporal Task Allocation under Temporal and Resource Constraints
summary: Complex multi-robot missions often require heterogeneous teams to jointly optimize task allocation, scheduling, and path planning to improve team performance under strict constraints. We formalize these complexities into a new class of problems, dubbed Spatio-Temporal Efficacy-optimized Allocation for Multi-robot systems (STEAM). STEAM builds upon trait-based frameworks that model robots using their capabilities (e.g., payload and speed), but goes beyond the typical binary success-failure model by explicitly modeling the efficacy of allocations as trait-efficacy maps. These maps encode how the aggregated capabilities assigned to a task determine performance. Further, STEAM accommodates spatio-temporal constraints, including a user-specified time budget (i.e., maximum makespan). To solve STEAM problems, we contribute a novel algorithm named Efficacy-optimized Incremental Task Allocation Graph Search (E-ITAGS) that simultaneously optimizes task performance and respects time budgets by interleaving task allocation, scheduling, and path planning. Motivated by the fact that trait-efficacy maps are difficult, if not impossible, to specify, E-ITAGS efficiently learns them using a realizability-aware active learning module. Our approach is realizability-aware since it explicitly accounts for the fact that not all combinations of traits are realizable by the robots available during learning. Further, we derive experimentally-validated bounds on E-ITAGS' suboptimality with respect to efficacy. Detailed numerical simulations and experiments using an emergency response domain demonstrate that E-ITAGS generates allocations of higher efficacy compared to baselines, while respecting resource and spatio-temporal constraints. We also show that our active learning approach is sample efficient and establishes a principled tradeoff between data and computational efficiency.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel algorithm, E-ITAGS, for optimizing task allocation, scheduling, and path planning in multi-robot systems under spatio-temporal and resource constraints, using active learning to model trait-efficacy maps. It is validated through simulations and experiments demonstrating higher efficacy allocations compared to baselines.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为E-ITAGS的新算法，用于在时空和资源约束下优化多机器人系统中的任务分配、调度和路径规划，并使用主动学习来建模特征-功效图。通过仿真和实验验证，与基线相比，它展示了更高的功效分配。
summary_zh: 复杂的多机器人任务通常需要异构团队联合优化任务分配、调度和路径规划，以在严格约束下提高团队性能。 我们将这些复杂性形式化为一个新的问题类别，称为多机器人系统的时空功效优化分配（STEAM）。STEAM 以基于特征的框架为基础，该框架使用机器人的能力（例如，负载和速度）对其进行建模，但超越了典型的二元成功-失败模型，通过将分配的功效明确地建模为特征-功效图。 这些图编码了分配给任务的聚合能力如何决定性能。 此外，STEAM 适应时空约束，包括用户指定的时间预算（即，最大完工时间）。 为了解决 STEAM 问题，我们贡献了一种名为功效优化增量任务分配图搜索 (E-ITAGS) 的新算法，该算法通过交错任务分配、调度和路径规划来同时优化任务性能并遵守时间预算。 受特征-功效图难以甚至不可能指定这一事实的驱动，E-ITAGS 使用可实现性感知主动学习模块有效地学习它们。 我们的方法是可实现性感知的，因为它明确考虑了并非所有特征组合都可以通过学习期间可用的机器人来实现的事实。此外，我们推导了 E-ITAGS 相对功效的次优性的实验验证界限。 详细的数值模拟和使用应急响应领域的实验表明，与基线相比，E-ITAGS 生成具有更高功效的分配，同时符合资源和时空约束。 我们还证明了我们的主动学习方法具有样本效率，并在数据和计算效率之间建立了有原则的权衡。

title: Learning User Preferences Through Interaction for Long-Term Collaboration
summary: As conversational agents accumulate experience collaborating with users, adapting to user preferences is essential for fostering long-term relationships and improving collaboration quality over time. We introduce MultiSessionCollab, a benchmark that evaluates how well agents can learn user preferences and leverage them to improve collaboration quality throughout multiple sessions. To develop agents that succeed in this setting, we present long-term collaborative agents equipped with a memory that persists and refines user preference as interaction experience accumulates. Moreover, we demonstrate that learning signals can be derived from user simulator behavior in MultiSessionCollab to train agents to generate more comprehensive reflections and update their memory more effectively. Extensive experiments show that equipping agents with memory improves long-term collaboration, yielding higher task success rates, more efficient interactions, and reduced user effort. Finally, we conduct a human user study that demonstrates that memory helps improve user experience in real-world settings.
tldr: The paper introduces a benchmark (MultiSessionCollab) for evaluating how well agents learn and leverage user preferences in long-term collaborations. They propose agents with memory to improve task success, interaction efficiency, and user experience, and demonstrate practical training strategies.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个用于评估智能体在长期协作中学习和利用用户偏好程度的基准（MultiSessionCollab）。他们提出了具有记忆能力的智能体，以提高任务成功率、互动效率和用户体验，并展示了实际的训练策略。
summary_zh: 随着对话式智能体积累与用户协作的经验，适应用户偏好对于培养长期关系和提升随时间推移的协作质量至关重要。我们引入 MultiSessionCollab，一个评估智能体在多轮会话中学习用户偏好并利用这些偏好来提升协作质量的基准。为了开发能够在此环境中取得成功的智能体，我们提出了配备有记忆的长期协作智能体，该记忆能够持久化并随着交互经验的积累而改进用户偏好。此外，我们证明了可以从 MultiSessionCollab 中的用户模拟器行为中提取学习信号，以训练智能体生成更全面的反思，并更有效地更新其记忆。大量的实验表明，为智能体配备记忆能够改善长期协作，从而提高任务成功率、提高交互效率并减少用户负担。最后，我们进行了一项真人用户研究，表明记忆有助于改善现实环境中的用户体验。

title: PC2P: Multi-Agent Path Finding via Personalized-Enhanced Communication and Crowd Perception
summary: Distributed Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) integrated with Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) has emerged as a prominent research focus, enabling real-time cooperative decision-making in partially observable environments through inter-agent communication. However, due to insufficient collaborative and perceptual capabilities, existing methods are inadequate for scaling across diverse environmental conditions. To address these challenges, we propose PC2P, a novel distributed MAPF method derived from a Q-learning-based MARL framework. Initially, we introduce a personalized-enhanced communication mechanism based on dynamic graph topology, which ascertains the core aspects of ``who" and ``what" in interactive process through three-stage operations: selection, generation, and aggregation. Concurrently, we incorporate local crowd perception to enrich agents' heuristic observation, thereby strengthening the model's guidance for effective actions via the integration of static spatial constraints and dynamic occupancy changes. To resolve extreme deadlock issues, we propose a region-based deadlock-breaking strategy that leverages expert guidance to implement efficient coordination within confined areas. Experimental results demonstrate that PC2P achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art distributed MAPF methods in varied environments. Ablation studies further confirm the effectiveness of each module for overall performance.
tldr: The paper introduces PC2P, a novel distributed MAPF method using Q-learning-based MARL, enhanced with personalized communication and crowd perception for improved performance across diverse environments and deadlock resolution.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了PC2P，一种新型的分布式MAPF方法，它使用基于Q学习的MARL，通过个性化通信和人群感知来增强性能，从而在各种环境中（解决死锁）都得以提升。
summary_zh: 结合多智能体强化学习（MARL）的分布式多智能体路径规划（MAPF）已成为一个重要的研究焦点，通过智能体间的通信，能够在部分可观测环境中实现实时的协同决策。然而，由于协作和感知能力不足，现有方法不足以适应各种环境条件下的扩展需求。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于Q学习的MARL框架衍生的新型分布式MAPF方法PC2P。首先，我们引入了一种基于动态图拓扑的个性化增强通信机制，通过选择、生成和聚合三个阶段的操作，确定交互过程中的“谁”和“什么”这两个核心方面。同时，我们结合了局部拥堵感知来丰富智能体的启发式观测，从而通过整合静态空间约束和动态占用变化来增强模型对有效动作的引导。为了解决极端的死锁问题，我们提出了一种基于区域的死锁解除策略，该策略利用专家指导在有限区域内实现高效的协调。实验结果表明，在各种环境中，与最先进的分布式MAPF方法相比，PC2P实现了卓越的性能。消融研究进一步证实了每个模块对整体性能的有效性。

title: Inferring Causal Graph Temporal Logic Formulas to Expedite Reinforcement Learning in Temporally Extended Tasks
summary: Decision-making tasks often unfold on graphs with spatial-temporal dynamics. Black-box reinforcement learning often overlooks how local changes spread through network structure, limiting sample efficiency and interpretability. We present GTL-CIRL, a closed-loop framework that simultaneously learns policies and mines Causal Graph Temporal Logic (Causal GTL) specifications. The method shapes rewards with robustness, collects counterexamples when effects fail, and uses Gaussian Process (GP) driven Bayesian optimization to refine parameterized cause templates. The GP models capture spatial and temporal correlations in the system dynamics, enabling efficient exploration of complex parameter spaces. Case studies in gene and power networks show faster learning and clearer, verifiable behavior compared to standard RL baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces GTL-CIRL, a framework that combines reinforcement learning with mining Causal Graph Temporal Logic (Causal GTL) specifications to improve sample efficiency and interpretability in decision-making tasks on spatial-temporal graphs, demonstrating its effectiveness on gene and power networks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为GTL-CIRL的框架，该框架结合了强化学习与挖掘因果图时态逻辑（Causal GTL）规范，以提高在时空图上的决策任务中的样本效率和可解释性，并在基因和电力网络上展示了其有效性。
summary_zh: 决策任务通常在具有时空动态的图上展开。黑箱强化学习常常忽略局部变化如何在网络结构中传播，从而限制了样本效率和可解释性。我们提出了GTL-CIRL，一个闭环框架，它可以同时学习策略并挖掘因果图时序逻辑（Causal GTL）规范。该方法利用鲁棒性塑造奖励，在效果失败时收集反例，并使用高斯过程（GP）驱动的贝叶斯优化来改进参数化的原因模板。高斯过程模型捕获系统动力学中的空间和时间相关性，从而能够高效地探索复杂的参数空间。在基因和电力网络中的案例研究表明，与标准强化学习基线相比，GTL-CIRL具有更快的学习速度和更清晰、可验证的行为。

title: Textual Explanations and Their Evaluations for Reinforcement Learning Policy
summary: Understanding a Reinforcement Learning (RL) policy is crucial for ensuring that autonomous agents behave according to human expectations. This goal can be achieved using Explainable Reinforcement Learning (XRL) techniques. Although textual explanations are easily understood by humans, ensuring their correctness remains a challenge, and evaluations in state-of-the-art remain limited. We present a novel XRL framework for generating textual explanations, converting them into a set of transparent rules, improving their quality, and evaluating them. Expert's knowledge can be incorporated into this framework, and an automatic predicate generator is also proposed to determine the semantic information of a state. Textual explanations are generated using a Large Language Model (LLM) and a clustering technique to identify frequent conditions. These conditions are then converted into rules to evaluate their properties, fidelity, and performance in the deployed environment. Two refinement techniques are proposed to improve the quality of explanations and reduce conflicting information. Experiments were conducted in three open-source environments to enable reproducibility, and in a telecom use case to evaluate the industrial applicability of the proposed XRL framework. This framework addresses the limitations of an existing method, Autonomous Policy Explanation, and the generated transparent rules can achieve satisfactory performance on certain tasks. This framework also enables a systematic and quantitative evaluation of textual explanations, providing valuable insights for the XRL field.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel XRL framework that generates, refines, and evaluates textual explanations for RL policies, using LLMs and clustering techniques to identify frequent conditions and convert them into transparent rules, with experiments showing satisfactory performance and improved explanation quality.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的 XRL 框架，该框架生成、改进和评估 RL 策略的文本解释，使用 LLM 和聚类技术来识别频繁条件并将其转换为透明规则，实验表明其具有令人满意的性能和改进的解释质量。
summary_zh: 理解强化学习（RL）策略对于确保自主体按照人类的期望行事至关重要。这一目标可以通过使用可解释强化学习（XRL）技术来实现。虽然文本解释易于人类理解，但确保其正确性仍然是一个挑战，并且最先进技术中的评估仍然有限。我们提出了一种新颖的XRL框架，用于生成文本解释，将其转换为一组透明规则，提高其质量并对其进行评估。可以将专家的知识融入到该框架中，并且还提出了一种自动谓词生成器来确定状态的语义信息。文本解释使用大型语言模型（LLM）和聚类技术生成，以识别频繁出现的条件。然后将这些条件转换为规则，以评估其属性、保真度和在部署环境中的性能。提出了两种改进技术来提高解释的质量并减少冲突信息。在三个开源环境中进行了实验以实现可重复性，并在电信用例中评估了所提出的XRL框架的工业适用性。 该框架解决了现有方法，即自主策略解释的局限性，并且生成的透明规则可以在某些任务上实现令人满意的性能。 该框架还支持对文本解释进行系统和定量评估，为XRL领域提供了宝贵的见解。

title: PatchAlign3D: Local Feature Alignment for Dense 3D Shape understanding
summary: Current foundation models for 3D shapes excel at global tasks (retrieval, classification) but transfer poorly to local part-level reasoning. Recent approaches leverage vision and language foundation models to directly solve dense tasks through multi-view renderings and text queries. While promising, these pipelines require expensive inference over multiple renderings, depend heavily on large language-model (LLM) prompt engineering for captions, and fail to exploit the inherent 3D geometry of shapes. We address this gap by introducing an encoder-only 3D model that produces language-aligned patch-level features directly from point clouds. Our pre-training approach builds on existing data engines that generate part-annotated 3D shapes by pairing multi-view SAM regions with VLM captioning. Using this data, we train a point cloud transformer encoder in two stages: (1) distillation of dense 2D features from visual encoders such as DINOv2 into 3D patches, and (2) alignment of these patch embeddings with part-level text embeddings through a multi-positive contrastive objective. Our 3D encoder achieves zero-shot 3D part segmentation with fast single-pass inference without any test-time multi-view rendering, while significantly outperforming previous rendering-based and feed-forward approaches across several 3D part segmentation benchmarks. Project website: https://souhail-hadgi.github.io/patchalign3dsite/
tldr: The paper introduces PatchAlign3D, a novel encoder-only 3D model that generates language-aligned, patch-level features from point clouds for improved 3D part segmentation, outperforming rendering-based and feed-forward approaches without multi-view rendering.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了PatchAlign3D，一种新型的仅编码器3D模型，可从点云生成语言对齐的patch级别特征，以改进3D部件分割，优于基于渲染和前馈的方法，且无需多视角渲染。
summary_zh: 当前三维形状的基础模型擅长全局任务（检索、分类），但在局部零件级别的推理上迁移性较差。最近的方法利用视觉和语言基础模型，通过多视点渲染和文本查询直接解决密集任务。虽然这些方法很有前景，但它们需要在多个渲染上进行昂贵的推理，严重依赖大型语言模型（LLM）的prompt工程进行描述，并且未能利用形状固有的三维几何信息。我们通过引入一个仅编码器的三维模型来弥补这一差距，该模型直接从点云生成与语言对齐的块级别特征。我们的预训练方法建立在现有的数据引擎之上，该引擎通过将多视点 SAM 区域与 VLM 描述配对来生成零件注释的三维形状。利用这些数据，我们分两个阶段训练点云 Transformer 编码器：（1）将来自视觉编码器（如 DINOv2）的密集二维特征提炼到三维块中，以及（2）通过多正对比目标将这些块嵌入与零件级别文本嵌入对齐。我们的三维编码器实现了零样本三维零件分割，并且能够进行快速的单次推理，无需任何测试时多视点渲染，同时在几个三维零件分割基准测试中显著优于以前基于渲染和前馈的方法。项目网站：https://souhail-hadgi.github.io/patchalign3dsite/

title: RPIQ: Residual-Projected Multi-Collaboration Closed-Loop and Single Instance Quantization for Visually Impaired Assistance
summary: Visually impaired users face significant challenges in daily information access and real-time environmental perception, and there is an urgent need for intelligent assistive systems with accurate recognition capabilities. Although large-scale models provide effective solutions for perception and reasoning, their practical deployment on assistive devices is severely constrained by excessive memory consumption and high inference costs. Moreover, existing quantization strategies often ignore inter-block error accumulation, leading to degraded model stability. To address these challenges, this study proposes a novel quantization framework -- Residual-Projected Multi-Collaboration Closed-Loop and Single Instance Quantization(RPIQ), whose quantization process adopts a multi-collaborative closed-loop compensation scheme based on Single Instance Calibration and Gauss-Seidel Iterative Quantization. Experiments on various types of large-scale models, including language models such as OPT, Qwen, and LLaMA, as well as vision-language models such as CogVLM2, demonstrate that RPIQ can compress models to 4-bit representation while significantly reducing peak memory consumption (approximately 60%-75% reduction compared to original full-precision models). The method maintains performance highly close to full-precision models across multiple language and visual tasks, and exhibits excellent recognition and reasoning capabilities in key applications such as text understanding and visual question answering in complex scenarios. While verifying the effectiveness of RPIQ for deployment in real assistive systems, this study also advances the computational efficiency and reliability of large models, enabling them to provide visually impaired users with the required information accurately and rapidly.
tldr: This paper introduces RPIQ, a novel quantization framework that compresses large language and vision-language models to 4-bit representations with minimal performance degradation, addressing the deployment challenges of assistive systems for visually impaired users.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的量化框架RPIQ，该框架将大型语言和视觉语言模型压缩为4位表示，同时性能下降最小，从而解决了视障用户辅助系统部署的挑战。
summary_zh: 视障用户在日常信息获取和实时环境感知方面面临重大挑战，迫切需要具有精确识别能力的智能辅助系统。虽然大规模模型为感知和推理提供了有效的解决方案，但其过度的内存消耗和高昂的推理成本严重制约了它们在辅助设备上的实际部署。此外，现有的量化策略通常忽略块间误差累积，导致模型稳定性下降。为了应对这些挑战，本研究提出了一种新的量化框架——残差投影多协作闭环单实例量化(RPIQ)，其量化过程采用基于单实例校准和高斯-赛德尔迭代量化的多协作闭环补偿方案。在包括OPT、Qwen和LLaMA等语言模型，以及CogVLM2等视觉-语言模型的多种大规模模型上进行的实验表明，RPIQ可以将模型压缩到4比特表示，同时显著降低峰值内存消耗（与原始全精度模型相比，约降低60%-75%）。该方法在多个语言和视觉任务中保持了与全精度模型高度接近的性能，并在复杂场景中的文本理解和视觉问答等关键应用中表现出卓越的识别和推理能力。在验证RPIQ在实际辅助系统中部署的有效性的同时，本研究还提升了大型模型的计算效率和可靠性，使其能够准确、快速地为视障用户提供所需的信息。

title: A Fast Semidefinite Convex Relaxation for Optimal Control Problems With Spatio-Temporal Constraints
summary: Solving optimal control problems (OCPs) of autonomous agents operating under spatial and temporal constraints fast and accurately is essential in applications ranging from eco-driving of autonomous vehicles to quadrotor navigation. However, the nonlinear programs approximating the OCPs are inherently nonconvex due to the coupling between the dynamics and the event timing, and therefore, they are challenging to solve. Most approaches address this challenge by predefining waypoint times or just using nonconvex trajectory optimization, which simplifies the problem but often yields suboptimal solutions. To significantly improve the numerical properties, we propose a formulation with a time-scaling direct multiple shooting scheme that partitions the prediction horizon into segments aligned with characteristic time constraints. Moreover, we develop a fast semidefinite-programming-based convex relaxation that exploits the sparsity pattern of the lifted formulation. Comprehensive simulation studies demonstrate the solution optimality and computational efficiency. Furthermore, real-world experiments on a quadrotor waypoint flight task with constrained open time windows validate the practical applicability of the approach in complex environments.
tldr: This paper introduces a fast semidefinite-programming-based convex relaxation method for solving optimal control problems with spatio-temporal constraints, demonstrated on autonomous vehicles and quadrotors.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于半定规划的快速凸松弛方法，用于解决具有时空约束的最优控制问题，并在自动驾驶车辆和四旋翼飞行器上进行了演示。
summary_zh: 解决在时空约束下自主智能体运行的最优控制问题（OCP），以快速且准确的方式，对于从自主车辆的生态驾驶到四旋翼导航等应用至关重要。然而，近似于OCP的非线性程序由于动力学和事件时间的耦合而本质上是非凸的，因此难以求解。大多数方法通过预定义航路点时间或仅使用非凸轨迹优化来应对这一挑战，这简化了问题，但通常会产生次优解。为了显著改善数值特性，我们提出了一种时间缩放直接多重射击方案的公式，该方案将预测时域分割成与特征时间约束对齐的段。此外，我们开发了一种基于半定规划的快速凸松弛方法，该方法利用了提升公式的稀疏模式。全面的仿真研究证明了解的最优性和计算效率。此外，在具有约束性开放时间窗口的四旋翼航路点飞行任务中的真实世界实验验证了该方法在复杂环境中实际应用的可行性。

title: Towards Zero-Shot Point Cloud Registration Across Diverse Scales, Scenes, and Sensor Setups
summary: Some deep learning-based point cloud registration methods struggle with zero-shot generalization, often requiring dataset-specific hyperparameter tuning or retraining for new environments. We identify three critical limitations: (a) fixed user-defined parameters (e.g., voxel size, search radius) that fail to generalize across varying scales, (b) learned keypoint detectors exhibit poor cross-domain transferability, and (c) absolute coordinates amplify scale mismatches between datasets. To address these three issues, we present BUFFER-X, a training-free registration framework that achieves zero-shot generalization through: (a) geometric bootstrapping for automatic hyperparameter estimation, (b) distribution-aware farthest point sampling to replace learned detectors, and (c) patch-level coordinate normalization to ensure scale consistency. Our approach employs hierarchical multi-scale matching to extract correspondences across local, middle, and global receptive fields, enabling robust registration in diverse environments. For efficiency-critical applications, we introduce BUFFER-X-Lite, which reduces total computation time by 43% (relative to BUFFER-X) through early exit strategies and fast pose solvers while preserving accuracy. We evaluate on a comprehensive benchmark comprising 12 datasets spanning object-scale, indoor, and outdoor scenes, including cross-sensor registration between heterogeneous LiDAR configurations. Results demonstrate that our approach generalizes effectively without manual tuning or prior knowledge of test domains. Code: https://github.com/MIT-SPARK/BUFFER-X.
tldr: The paper presents BUFFER-X, a training-free point cloud registration method that achieves zero-shot generalization across diverse scales, scenes, and sensor setups by addressing key limitations of deep learning-based approaches. It demonstrates strong performance on a comprehensive benchmark without dataset-specific tuning.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了BUFFER-X，一种无需训练的点云配准方法，通过解决深度学习方法的关键局限性，实现了在不同尺度、场景和传感器设置下的零样本泛化。该方法在综合基准测试中表现出色，无需针对特定数据集进行调整。
summary_zh: 一些基于深度学习的点云配准方法在零样本泛化方面表现不佳，通常需要针对特定数据集进行超参数调整或在新环境中进行重新训练。我们发现了三个关键限制：（a）固定的用户定义参数（例如，体素大小、搜索半径）无法推广到不同尺度，（b）学习到的关键点检测器表现出较差的跨域迁移能力，以及（c）绝对坐标会放大数据集之间的尺度不匹配。为了解决这三个问题，我们提出了 BUFFER-X，一种无需训练的配准框架，它通过以下方式实现零样本泛化：（a）用于自动超参数估计的几何引导自举，（b）用于替代学习检测器的分布感知最远点采样，以及（c）用于确保尺度一致性的块级坐标归一化。我们的方法采用分层多尺度匹配，以提取跨局部、中等和全局感受野的对应关系，从而在各种环境中实现鲁棒的配准。对于对效率至关重要的应用，我们引入了 BUFFER-X-Lite，它通过提前退出策略和快速位姿求解器，在保持精度的同时，将总计算时间减少了 43%（相对于 BUFFER-X）。我们在包含 12 个数据集的综合基准测试上进行了评估，这些数据集涵盖了对象尺度、室内和室外场景，包括异构 LiDAR 配置之间的跨传感器配准。结果表明，我们的方法在不需要手动调整或对测试域的先验知识的情况下，能够有效地泛化。代码：https://github.com/MIT-SPARK/BUFFER-X.

title: Loop Closure using AnyLoc Visual Place Recognition in DPV-SLAM
summary: Loop closure is crucial for maintaining the accuracy and consistency of visual SLAM. We propose a method to improve loop closure performance in DPV-SLAM. Our approach integrates AnyLoc, a learning-based visual place recognition technique, as a replacement for the classical Bag of Visual Words (BoVW) loop detection method. In contrast to BoVW, which relies on handcrafted features, AnyLoc utilizes deep feature representations, enabling more robust image retrieval across diverse viewpoints and lighting conditions. Furthermore, we propose an adaptive mechanism that dynamically adjusts similarity threshold based on environmental conditions, removing the need for manual tuning. Experiments on both indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the original DPV-SLAM in terms of loop closure accuracy and robustness. The proposed method offers a practical and scalable solution for enhancing loop closure performance in modern SLAM systems.
tldr: This paper improves loop closure in DPV-SLAM by replacing Bag of Visual Words with the learning-based visual place recognition technique AnyLoc and introducing an adaptive similarity threshold, demonstrating improved accuracy and robustness on indoor and outdoor datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文通过将DPV-SLAM中的视觉词袋方法替换为基于学习的视觉地点识别技术AnyLoc，并引入自适应相似度阈值，从而改进了DPV-SLAM中的回环闭合，并在室内和室外数据集上展示了更高的精度和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 回环闭合对于维持视觉SLAM的精度和一致性至关重要。我们提出了一种方法来提高DPV-SLAM中的回环闭合性能。我们的方法集成了AnyLoc，一种基于学习的视觉位置识别技术，以替代经典词袋模型（BoVW）回环检测方法。与依赖于手工特征的BoVW不同，AnyLoc利用深度特征表示，从而能够在不同的视角和光照条件下实现更鲁棒的图像检索。此外，我们提出了一种自适应机制，该机制可以根据环境条件动态调整相似度阈值，从而无需手动调整。在室内和室外数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法在回环闭合精度和鲁棒性方面均显著优于原始DPV-SLAM。所提出的方法为增强现代SLAM系统中的回环闭合性能提供了一种实用且可扩展的解决方案。

title: Analysis of Various Manipulator Configurations Based on Multi-Objective Black-Box Optimization
summary: Various 6-degree-of-freedom (DOF) and 7-DOF manipulators have been developed to date. Over a long history, their joint configurations and link length ratios have been determined empirically. In recent years, the development of robotic foundation models has become increasingly active, leading to the continuous proposal of various manipulators to support these models. However, none of these manipulators share exactly the same structure, as the order of joints and the ratio of link lengths differ among robots. Therefore, in order to discuss the optimal structure of a manipulator, we performed multi-objective optimization from the perspectives of end-effector reachability and joint torque. We analyze where existing manipulator structures stand within the sampling results of the optimization and provide insights for future manipulator design.
tldr: This paper uses multi-objective optimization to analyze existing 6-DOF and 7-DOF manipulator configurations, considering end-effector reachability and joint torque, to provide insights for future manipulator design.
tldr_zh: 本文通过多目标优化分析现有6自由度和7自由度机械臂的配置，考虑末端执行器的可达性和关节扭矩，为未来的机械臂设计提供见解。
summary_zh: 目前已经开发出各种6自由度(DOF)和7自由度机械臂。在漫长的发展历程中，它们的关节构型和连杆长度比是通过经验确定的。近年来，机器人基础模型的发展日益活跃，不断有新的机械臂被提出以支持这些模型。然而，由于关节的顺序和连杆长度比在不同的机器人之间存在差异，这些机械臂没有完全相同的结构。因此，为了探讨机械臂的最佳结构，我们从末端执行器可达性和关节扭矩的角度进行了多目标优化。我们分析了现有机械臂结构在优化采样结果中的位置，并为未来的机械臂设计提供了见解。

title: SA-ResGS: Self-Augmented Residual 3D Gaussian Splatting for Next Best View Selection
summary: We propose Self-Augmented Residual 3D Gaussian Splatting (SA-ResGS), a novel framework to stabilize uncertainty quantification and enhancing uncertainty-aware supervision in next-best-view (NBV) selection for active scene reconstruction. SA-ResGS improves both the reliability of uncertainty estimates and their effectiveness for supervision by generating Self-Augmented point clouds (SA-Points) via triangulation between a training view and a rasterized extrapolated view, enabling efficient scene coverage estimation. While improving scene coverage through physically guided view selection, SA-ResGS also addresses the challenge of under-supervised Gaussians, exacerbated by sparse and wide-baseline views, by introducing the first residual learning strategy tailored for 3D Gaussian Splatting. This targeted supervision enhances gradient flow in high-uncertainty Gaussians by combining uncertainty-driven filtering with dropout- and hard-negative-mining-inspired sampling. Our contributions are threefold: (1) a physically grounded view selection strategy that promotes efficient and uniform scene coverage; (2) an uncertainty-aware residual supervision scheme that amplifies learning signals for weakly contributing Gaussians, improving training stability and uncertainty estimation across scenes with diverse camera distributions; (3) an implicit unbiasing of uncertainty quantification as a consequence of constrained view selection and residual supervision, which together mitigate conflicting effects of wide-baseline exploration and sparse-view ambiguity in NBV planning. Experiments on active view selection demonstrate that SA-ResGS outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both reconstruction quality and view selection robustness.
tldr: The paper introduces SA-ResGS, a novel 3D Gaussian Splatting framework for next-best-view (NBV) selection in active scene reconstruction. It enhances uncertainty quantification and training stability through self-augmented point clouds and residual learning.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SA-ResGS，一种用于主动场景重建中下一次最佳视角（NBV）选择的新型3D高斯溅射框架。它通过自增强点云和残差学习增强了不确定性量化和训练稳定性。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种自增强残差3D高斯溅射（SA-ResGS）的新型框架，旨在稳定不确定性量化，并增强主动场景重建中用于最佳下一视角（NBV）选择的不确定性感知监督。SA-ResGS通过在训练视图和光栅化的外推视图之间进行三角剖分来生成自增强点云（SA-Points），从而提高不确定性估计的可靠性及其对监督的有效性，进而实现高效的场景覆盖估计。在通过物理引导的视角选择来改善场景覆盖的同时，SA-ResGS还通过引入首个专为3D高斯溅射量身定制的残差学习策略，解决了受稀疏和宽基线视角放大的高斯欠监督问题。这种有针对性的监督通过将不确定性驱动的滤波与受dropout和Hard-Negative-Mining启发的采样相结合，增强了高不确定性高斯中的梯度流动。我们的贡献有三方面：（1）一种物理基础的视角选择策略，可促进高效且均匀的场景覆盖；（2）一种不确定性感知的残差监督方案，可放大对弱贡献高斯的学习信号，从而提高具有不同相机分布场景中的训练稳定性和不确定性估计；（3）对不确定性量化的隐式去偏，这是约束视角选择和残差监督的结果，两者共同缓解了宽基线探索和稀疏视角模糊性在NBV规划中的冲突效应。主动视角选择的实验表明，SA-ResGS在重建质量和视角选择鲁棒性方面均优于最先进的基线方法。

title: Towards Efficient 3D Object Detection for Vehicle-Infrastructure Collaboration via Risk-Intent Selection
summary: Vehicle-Infrastructure Collaborative Perception (VICP) is pivotal for resolving occlusion in autonomous driving, yet the trade-off between communication bandwidth and feature redundancy remains a critical bottleneck. While intermediate fusion mitigates data volume compared to raw sharing, existing frameworks typically rely on spatial compression or static confidence maps, which inefficiently transmit spatially redundant features from non-critical background regions. To address this, we propose Risk-intent Selective detection (RiSe), an interaction-aware framework that shifts the paradigm from identifying visible regions to prioritizing risk-critical ones. Specifically, we introduce a Potential Field-Trajectory Correlation Model (PTCM) grounded in potential field theory to quantitatively assess kinematic risks. Complementing this, an Intention-Driven Area Prediction Module (IDAPM) leverages ego-motion priors to proactively predict and filter key Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) areas essential for decision-making. By integrating these components, RiSe implements a semantic-selective fusion scheme that transmits high-fidelity features only from high-interaction regions, effectively acting as a feature denoiser. Extensive experiments on the DeepAccident dataset demonstrate that our method reduces communication volume to 0.71\% of full feature sharing while maintaining state-of-the-art detection accuracy, establishing a competitive Pareto frontier between bandwidth efficiency and perception performance.
tldr: This paper introduces RiSe, a vehicle-infrastructure collaborative perception framework that uses risk and intention prediction to selectively transmit high-fidelity features from critical regions, achieving high detection accuracy with drastically reduced communication volume.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为RiSe的车路协同感知框架，该框架利用风险和意图预测选择性地传输关键区域的高保真特征，从而在大幅降低通信量的同时实现高检测精度。
summary_zh: 车辆-基础设施协同感知（VICP）对于解决自动驾驶中的遮挡至关重要，但通信带宽与特征冗余之间的权衡仍然是一个关键瓶颈。虽然中间融合相比于原始数据共享减少了数据量，但现有的框架通常依赖于空间压缩或静态置信度图，导致从非关键背景区域传输空间冗余特征的效率低下。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了风险意图选择性检测（RiSe），一个交互感知的框架，将范式从识别可见区域转变为优先处理风险关键区域。具体而言，我们引入了基于势场理论的势场-轨迹相关模型（PTCM）来定量评估运动风险。为了补充这一点，意图驱动区域预测模块（IDAPM）利用自车运动先验来主动预测和过滤对决策至关重要的关键鸟瞰图（BEV）区域。通过整合这些组件，RiSe实现了一种语义选择性融合方案，仅从高交互区域传输高保真特征，有效地充当特征去噪器。在DeepAccident数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法将通信量减少到完整特征共享的0.71%，同时保持最先进的检测精度，从而在带宽效率和感知性能之间建立了一个具有竞争力的帕累托前沿。

title: HOLO: Homography-Guided Pose Estimator Network for Fine-Grained Visual Localization on SD Maps
summary: Visual localization on standard-definition (SD) maps has emerged as a promising low-cost and scalable solution for autonomous driving. However, existing regression-based approaches often overlook inherent geometric priors, resulting in suboptimal training efficiency and limited localization accuracy. In this paper, we propose a novel homography-guided pose estimator network for fine-grained visual localization between multi-view images and standard-definition (SD) maps. We construct input pairs that satisfy a homography constraint by projecting ground-view features into the BEV domain and enforcing semantic alignment with map features. Then we leverage homography relationships to guide feature fusion and restrict the pose outputs to a valid feasible region, which significantly improves training efficiency and localization accuracy compared to prior methods relying on attention-based fusion and direct 3-DoF pose regression. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to unify BEV semantic reasoning with homography learning for image-to-map localization. Furthermore, by explicitly modeling homography transformations, the proposed framework naturally supports cross-resolution inputs, enhancing model flexibility. Extensive experiments on the nuScenes dataset demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art visual localization methods. Code and pretrained models will be publicly released to foster future research.
tldr: This paper proposes a homography-guided pose estimator network (HOLO) for fine-grained visual localization using SD maps, achieving state-of-the-art results on the nuScenes dataset by unifying BEV semantic reasoning with homography learning.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于同态变换引导的姿态估计网络 (HOLO)，用于使用 SD 地图进行精细的视觉定位。通过将 BEV 语义推理与同态变换学习相结合，该方法在 nuScenes 数据集上取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 在标准清晰度 (SD) 地图上的视觉定位已成为自动驾驶领域一种有前景的低成本且可扩展的解决方案。然而，现有的基于回归的方法常常忽略固有的几何先验，导致次优的训练效率和有限的定位精度。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于单应矩阵引导的姿态估计网络，用于多视角图像和标准清晰度 (SD) 地图之间的精细视觉定位。我们通过将地平面视角特征投影到鸟瞰图 (BEV) 域，并强制与地图特征进行语义对齐，来构建满足单应约束的输入对。然后，我们利用单应关系来引导特征融合，并将姿态输出限制在有效的可行区域内，与先前依赖于基于注意力的融合和直接三自由度 (3-DoF) 姿态回归的方法相比，这显著提高了训练效率和定位精度。据我们所知，这是第一个将 BEV 语义推理与单应矩阵学习统一起来用于图像到地图定位的工作。此外，通过显式地建模单应变换，所提出的框架自然地支持跨分辨率输入，从而增强了模型灵活性。在 nuScenes 数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法显著优于现有的最先进的视觉定位方法。代码和预训练模型将被公开，以促进未来的研究。

title: CAMO: Category-Agnostic 3D Motion Transfer from Monocular 2D Videos
summary: Motion transfer from 2D videos to 3D assets is a challenging problem, due to inherent pose ambiguities and diverse object shapes, often requiring category-specific parametric templates. We propose CAMO, a category-agnostic framework that transfers motion to diverse target meshes directly from monocular 2D videos without relying on predefined templates or explicit 3D supervision. The core of CAMO is a morphology-parameterized articulated 3D Gaussian splatting model combined with dense semantic correspondences to jointly adapt shape and pose through optimization. This approach effectively alleviates shape-pose ambiguities, enabling visually faithful motion transfer for diverse categories. Experimental results demonstrate superior motion accuracy, efficiency, and visual coherence compared to existing methods, significantly advancing motion transfer in varied object categories and casual video scenarios.
tldr: CAMO presents a category-agnostic framework for transferring motion from monocular 2D videos to diverse 3D meshes, using a morphology-parameterized articulated 3D Gaussian splatting model and dense semantic correspondences to jointly optimize shape and pose.
tldr_zh: CAMO 提出了一个类别无关的框架，用于将单目 2D 视频中的运动迁移到不同的 3D 网格，使用形态参数化的铰接 3D 高斯溅射模型和密集语义对应关系来联合优化形状和姿势。
summary_zh:
摘要：
从 2D 视频到 3D 资产的运动传递是一个具有挑战性的问题，由于固有的姿态歧义和多样的物体形状，通常需要特定类别的参数化模板。我们提出了 CAMO，一个类别无关的框架，可以直接从单目 2D 视频将运动传递到不同的目标网格，而无需依赖预定义的模板或显式的 3D 监督。CAMO 的核心是一个形态参数化的铰接式 3D 高斯泼溅模型，结合密集的语义对应关系，通过优化共同调整形状和姿态。这种方法有效地缓解了形状-姿态歧义，从而能够为各种类别实现视觉上逼真的运动传递。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，CAMO 在运动精度、效率和视觉连贯性方面表现出优越性，显著推进了在各种物体类别和休闲视频场景中的运动传递。

title: Finite Memory Belief Approximation for Optimal Control in Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes
summary: We study finite memory belief approximation for partially observable (PO) stochastic optimal control (SOC) problems. While belief states are sufficient for SOC in partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs), they are generally infinite-dimensional and impractical. We interpret truncated input-output (IO) histories as inducing a belief approximation and develop a metric-based theory that directly relates information loss to control performance. Using the Wasserstein metric, we derive policy-conditional performance bounds that quantify value degradation induced by finite memory along typical closed-loop trajectories. Our analysis proceeds via a fixed-policy comparison: we evaluate two cost functionals under the same closed-loop execution and isolate the effect of replacing the true belief by its finite memory approximation inside the belief-level cost. For linear quadratic Gaussian (LQG) systems, we provide closed-form belief mismatch evaluation and empirically validate the predicted mechanism, demonstrating that belief mismatch decays approximately exponentially with memory length and that the induced performance mismatch scales accordingly. Together, these results provide a metric-aware characterization of what finite memory belief approximation can and cannot achieve in PO settings.
tldr: This paper analyzes the performance degradation of using finite memory belief approximation in POMDPs, deriving performance bounds and providing closed-form evaluation for LQG systems. It offers a metric-aware characterization of finite memory belief approximation in partially observable scenarios.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了在POMDP中使用有限记忆信念近似的性能下降，推导了性能界限，并为LQG系统提供了闭式评估。它提供了在部分可观察场景中有限记忆信念近似的度量感知表征。
summary_zh: 我们研究了部分可观测（PO）随机最优控制（SOC）问题中的有限记忆信念近似。虽然信念状态足以解决部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）中的SOC问题，但它们通常是无限维的，且在实践中不可行。我们将截断的输入-输出（IO）历史解释为诱导一种信念近似，并发展了一种基于度量的理论，该理论直接关联了信息损失与控制性能。利用Wasserstein度量，我们推导出了策略条件下的性能界限，该界限量化了沿典型闭环轨迹由有限记忆引起的价值劣化。我们的分析通过固定策略比较进行：我们在相同的闭环执行下评估两个成本泛函，并隔离了用有限记忆近似代替真实信念状态对信念层级成本的影响。对于线性二次高斯（LQG）系统，我们提供了闭式信念失配评估，并通过实验验证了预测机制，表明信念失配随记忆长度近似呈指数衰减，且由此产生的性能失配相应地缩放。总而言之，这些结果对有限记忆信念近似在PO设置中所能达到和不能达到的目标进行了度量感知的刻画。

title: Advancing Assistive Robotics: Multi-Modal Navigation and Biophysical Monitoring for Next-Generation Wheelchairs
summary:
Assistive electric-powered wheelchairs (EPWs) have become essential mobility aids for people with disabilities such as amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), post-stroke hemiplegia, and dementia-related mobility impairment. This work presents a novel multi-modal EPW control system designed to prioritize patient needs while allowing seamless switching between control modes. Four complementary interfaces, namely joystick, speech, hand gesture, and electrooculography (EOG), are integrated with a continuous vital sign monitoring framework measuring heart rate variability, oxygen saturation (SpO2), and skin temperature. This combination enables greater patient independence while allowing caregivers to maintain real-time supervision and early intervention capability.
  Two-point calibration of the biophysical sensors against clinical reference devices resulted in root mean square errors of at most 2 bpm for heart rate, 0.5 degree Celsius for skin temperature, and 1 percent for SpO2. Experimental evaluation involved twenty participants with mobility impairments executing a total of 500 indoor navigation commands. The achieved command recognition accuracies were 99 percent for joystick control, 97 percent plus or minus 2 percent for speech, and 95 percent plus or minus 3 percent for hand gesture, with an average closed-loop latency of 20 plus or minus 0.5 milliseconds. Caregivers receive real-time alerts through an Android application following encrypted cloud transmission of physiological data. By integrating multi-modal mobility control with cloud-enabled health monitoring and reporting latency and energy budgets, the proposed prototype addresses key challenges in assistive robotics, contributes toward compliance with ISO 7176-31 and IEC 80601-2-78 safety standards, and establishes a foundation for future adaptive machine learning enhancements.
tldr: This paper presents a multi-modal control system for electric-powered wheelchairs, integrating joystick, speech, hand gesture, and electrooculography interfaces with biophysical monitoring and cloud-based reporting to improve patient independence and caregiver supervision.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种电动轮椅的多模态控制系统，该系统集成了操纵杆、语音、手势和眼动跟踪界面，并结合了生物物理监测和基于云的报告功能，以提高患者的独立性和护理人员的监管能力。
summary_zh:
辅助电动轮椅 (EPW) 已成为肌萎缩侧索硬化症 (ALS)、中风后偏瘫和痴呆相关行动障碍等残疾人士必不可少的移动辅助工具。 本文提出一种新型多模态 EPW 控制系统，旨在优先考虑患者需求，同时允许在控制模式之间无缝切换。 四种互补的接口，即操纵杆、语音、手势和眼动电描 (EOG)，与一个连续的生命体征监测框架集成，该框架测量心率变异性、血氧饱和度 (SpO2) 和皮肤温度。 这种组合在提高患者独立性的同时，允许护理人员保持实时监督和早期干预能力。

生物物理传感器针对临床参考设备进行的两点校准，导致心率的均方根误差最大为 2 bpm，皮肤温度为 0.5 摄氏度，SpO2 为 1%。 实验评估涉及 20 名行动障碍参与者，共执行 500 个室内导航命令。 实现的命令识别准确率，操纵杆控制为 99%，语音为 97% 正负 2%，手势为 95% 正负 3%，平均闭环延迟为 20 正负 0.5 毫秒。 护理人员通过 Android 应用程序接收实时警报，该应用程序通过加密的云传输生理数据。 通过将多模态移动控制与支持云的健康监测、报告延迟和能量预算相结合，所提出的原型解决了辅助机器人技术中的关键挑战，有助于符合 ISO 7176-31 和 IEC 80601-2-78 安全标准，并为未来的自适应机器学习增强奠定基础。

title: CageDroneRF: A Large-Scale RF Benchmark and Toolkit for Drone Perception
summary: We present CageDroneRF (CDRF), a large-scale benchmark for Radio-Frequency (RF) drone detection and identification built from real-world captures and systematically generated synthetic variants. CDRF addresses the scarcity and limited diversity of existing RF datasets by coupling extensive raw recordings with a principled augmentation pipeline that (i) precisely controls Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR), (ii) injects interfering emitters, and (iii) applies frequency shifts with label-consistent bounding-box transformations for detection. This dataset spans a wide range of contemporary drone models, many unavailable in current public datasets, and acquisition conditions, derived from data collected at the Rowan University campus and within a controlled RF-cage facility. CDRF is released with interoperable open-source tools for data generation, preprocessing, augmentation, and evaluation that also operate on existing public benchmarks. CDRF enables standardized benchmarking for classification, open-set recognition, and object detection, supporting rigorous comparisons and reproducible pipelines. By releasing this comprehensive benchmark and tooling, CDRF aims to accelerate progress toward robust, generalizable RF perception models.
tldr: The paper introduces CageDroneRF (CDRF), a large-scale, diverse RF dataset and toolkit for drone detection and identification, aiming to accelerate research in robust RF perception models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了CageDroneRF (CDRF)，一个大规模、多样化的射频数据集和工具包，用于无人机检测和识别，旨在加速对鲁棒射频感知模型的研究。
summary_zh: 我们提出了CageDroneRF (CDRF)，这是一个用于无线射频(RF)无人机检测和识别的大规模基准数据集，它由真实世界的采集和系统生成的合成变体构成。CDRF通过将广泛的原始录音与一个有原则的增强流程相结合，解决了现有RF数据集匮乏和多样性有限的问题，该增强流程 (i) 精确控制信噪比(SNR), (ii) 注入干扰发射器, 以及(iii) 应用频率偏移，并进行标签一致的边界框变换以用于检测。该数据集涵盖了广泛的现代无人机型号，其中许多在当前的公共数据集中不可用，以及采集条件，这些数据来自罗文大学校园和受控的RF屏蔽室设施内的数据采集。CDRF发布时带有可互操作的开源工具，用于数据生成、预处理、增强和评估，这些工具也可用于现有的公共基准数据集。CDRF能够实现对分类、开放集识别和目标检测的标准化基准测试，支持严格的比较和可重复的流程。通过发布这个全面的基准数据集和工具，CDRF旨在加速实现稳健、可泛化的RF感知模型。

title: Listen to Rhythm, Choose Movements: Autoregressive Multimodal Dance Generation via Diffusion and Mamba with Decoupled Dance Dataset
summary: Advances in generative models and sequence learning have greatly promoted research in dance motion generation, yet current methods still suffer from coarse semantic control and poor coherence in long sequences. In this work, we present Listen to Rhythm, Choose Movements (LRCM), a multimodal-guided diffusion framework supporting both diverse input modalities and autoregressive dance motion generation. We explore a feature decoupling paradigm for dance datasets and generalize it to the Motorica Dance dataset, separating motion capture data, audio rhythm, and professionally annotated global and local text descriptions. Our diffusion architecture integrates an audio-latent Conformer and a text-latent Cross-Conformer, and incorporates a Motion Temporal Mamba Module (MTMM) to enable smooth, long-duration autoregressive synthesis. Experimental results indicate that LRCM delivers strong performance in both functional capability and quantitative metrics, demonstrating notable potential in multimodal input scenarios and extended sequence generation. We will release the full codebase, dataset, and pretrained models publicly upon acceptance.
tldr: The paper introduces Listen to Rhythm, Choose Movements (LRCM), a multimodal diffusion framework for autoregressive dance motion generation, leveraging a decoupled dance dataset and Mamba module for improved coherence and long sequence generation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Listen to Rhythm, Choose Movements (LRCM)，一个用于自回归舞蹈动作生成的多模态扩散框架，利用解耦的舞蹈数据集和Mamba模块来提高连贯性和长序列生成。
summary_zh: 生成模型和序列学习的进步极大地推动了舞蹈动作生成的研究，但当前的方法仍然存在语义控制粗糙和长序列中连贯性差的问题。在本文中，我们提出了“倾听节奏，选择动作”（LRCM），这是一个支持多种输入模态和自回归舞蹈动作生成的多模态引导扩散框架。我们探索了一种用于舞蹈数据集的特征解耦范式，并将其推广到Motorica Dance数据集，分离了动作捕捉数据、音频节奏以及专业注释的全局和局部文本描述。我们的扩散架构集成了音频潜在Conformer和文本潜在Cross-Conformer，并融入了运动时间Mamba模块（MTMM），以实现平滑、长时间的自回归合成。实验结果表明，LRCM在功能能力和定量指标上都表现出强大的性能，展示了在多模态输入场景和扩展序列生成方面的显著潜力。我们将于接受发表后公开全部代码库、数据集和预训练模型。

title: Meta-Learning Guided Pruning for Few-Shot Plant Pathology on Edge Devices
summary: Farmers in remote areas need quick and reliable methods for identifying plant diseases, yet they often lack access to laboratories or high-performance computing resources. Deep learning models can detect diseases from leaf images with high accuracy, but these models are typically too large and computationally expensive to run on low-cost edge devices such as Raspberry Pi. Furthermore, collecting thousands of labeled disease images for training is both expensive and time-consuming. This paper addresses both challenges by combining neural network pruning -- removing unnecessary parts of the model -- with few-shot learning, which enables the model to learn from limited examples. This paper proposes Disease-Aware Channel Importance Scoring (DACIS), a method that identifies which parts of the neural network are most important for distinguishing between different plant diseases, integrated into a three-stage Prune-then-Meta-Learn-then-Prune (PMP) pipeline. Experiments on PlantVillage and PlantDoc datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach reduces model size by 78\% while maintaining 92.3\% of the original accuracy, with the compressed model running at 7 frames per second on a Raspberry Pi 4, making real-time field diagnosis practical for smallholder farmers.
tldr: This paper proposes a meta-learning guided pruning method called DACIS for few-shot plant pathology on edge devices, achieving significant model compression with minimal accuracy loss and enabling real-time diagnosis on Raspberry Pi.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于元学习引导的剪枝方法 DACIS，用于边缘设备上的小样本植物病理识别。该方法实现了显著的模型压缩，同时保持了较高的精度，并能够在 Raspberry Pi 上进行实时诊断。
summary_zh: 偏远地区的农民需要快速可靠的植物病害识别方法，但他们往往无法获得实验室或高性能计算资源。深度学习模型可以从叶片图像中高精度地检测疾病，但这些模型通常过于庞大且计算成本过高，无法在诸如树莓派等低成本边缘设备上运行。此外，收集数千张带标签的疾病图像进行训练既昂贵又耗时。本文通过结合神经网络剪枝（去除模型中不必要的部分）和少样本学习（使模型能够从有限的例子中学习）来应对这两个挑战。本文提出了一种疾病感知通道重要性评分(DACIS)方法，该方法识别神经网络中对于区分不同植物病害最关键的部分，并将其集成到一个三阶段的剪枝-元学习-剪枝（PMP）流程中。在PlantVillage和PlantDoc数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法在保持原始精度92.3%的情况下，将模型大小减少了78%，压缩后的模型在树莓派4上以每秒7帧的速度运行，使小农户能够进行实时的田间诊断成为可能。

title: Predicting Time Pressure of Powered Two-Wheeler Riders for Proactive Safety Interventions
summary: Time pressure critically influences risky maneuvers and crash proneness among powered two-wheeler riders, yet its prediction remains underexplored in intelligent transportation systems. We present a large-scale dataset of 129,000+ labeled multivariate time-series sequences from 153 rides by 51 participants under No, Low, and High Time Pressure conditions. Each sequence captures 63 features spanning vehicle kinematics, control inputs, behavioral violations, and environmental context. Our empirical analysis shows High Time Pressure induces 48% higher speeds, 36.4% greater speed variability, 58% more risky turns at intersections, 36% more sudden braking, and 50% higher rear brake forces versus No Time Pressure. To benchmark this dataset, we propose MotoTimePressure, a deep learning model combining convolutional preprocessing, dual-stage temporal attention, and Squeeze-and-Excitation feature recalibration, achieving 91.53% accuracy and 98.93% ROC AUC, outperforming eight baselines. Since time pressure cannot be directly measured in real time, we demonstrate its utility in collision prediction and threshold determination. Using MTPS-predicted time pressure as features, improves Informer-based collision risk accuracy from 91.25% to 93.51%, approaching oracle performance (93.72%). Thresholded time pressure states capture rider cognitive stress and enable proactive ITS interventions, including adaptive alerts, haptic feedback, V2I signaling, and speed guidance, supporting safer two-wheeler mobility under the Safe System Approach.
tldr: This paper introduces a large-scale dataset and deep learning model (MotoTimePressure) for predicting time pressure in powered two-wheeler riders, demonstrating its utility in collision prediction and enabling proactive safety interventions.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个大规模数据集和一个深度学习模型 (MotoTimePressure)，用于预测摩托车骑手的时间压力，展示了其在碰撞预测中的效用，并实现了主动安全干预。
summary_zh: 时间压力对动力两轮车骑行者的风险操作和事故倾向有重要影响，但在智能交通系统中对其预测仍然未被充分探索。我们提出了一个大规模数据集，包含来自51名参与者在无、低和高时间压力条件下153次骑行的129,000+带标签的多元时间序列。 每个序列捕捉了63个特征，涵盖车辆运动学、控制输入、违规行为和环境背景。我们的实证分析表明，在高时间压力下，速度提高48%、速度变化幅度增加36.4%、路口危险转弯增加58%、急刹车增加36%、后制动力增加50% (相对于无时间压力)。为了对该数据集进行基准测试，我们提出了MotoTimePressure模型，这是一种深度学习模型，结合了卷积预处理、双阶段时间注意力和Squeeze-and-Excitation特征重校准，获得了91.53%的准确率和98.93%的ROC AUC，优于八个基线模型。由于时间压力无法在实时环境中直接测量，我们展示了其在碰撞预测和阈值确定中的效用。 使用MTPS预测的时间压力作为特征，将基于Informer的碰撞风险准确率从91.25%提高到93.51%，接近oracle性能（93.72%）。阈值化的时间压力状态可以捕捉骑行者的认知压力，并实现主动的ITS干预，包括自适应警报、触觉反馈、V2I信号和速度引导，从而在安全系统方法下支持更安全的两轮车出行。

title: From Muscle to Text with MyoText: sEMG to Text via Finger Classification and Transformer-Based Decoding
summary: Surface electromyography (sEMG) provides a direct neural interface for decoding muscle activity and offers a promising foundation for keyboard-free text input in wearable and mixed-reality systems. Previous sEMG-to-text studies mainly focused on recognizing letters directly from sEMG signals, forming an important first step toward translating muscle activity into text. Building on this foundation, we present MyoText, a hierarchical framework that decodes sEMG signals to text through physiologically grounded intermediate stages. MyoText first classifies finger activations from multichannel sEMG using a CNN-BiLSTM-Attention model, applies ergonomic typing priors to infer letters, and reconstructs full sentences with a fine-tuned T5 transformer. This modular design mirrors the natural hierarchy of typing, linking muscle intent to language output and reducing the search space for decoding. Evaluated on 30 users from the emg2qwerty dataset, MyoText outperforms baselines by achieving 85.4% finger-classification accuracy, 5.4% character error rate (CER), and 6.5% word error rate (WER). Beyond accuracy gains, this methodology establishes a principled pathway from neuromuscular signals to text, providing a blueprint for virtual and augmented-reality typing interfaces that operate entirely without physical keyboards. By integrating ergonomic structure with transformer-based linguistic reasoning, MyoText advances the feasibility of seamless, wearable neural input for future ubiquitous computing environments.
tldr: MyoText is a novel sEMG-to-text framework that uses a CNN-BiLSTM-Attention model for finger classification and a T5 transformer for text reconstruction, achieving state-of-the-art results on the emg2qwerty dataset and providing a pathway for keyboard-free text input.
tldr_zh: MyoText是一个新颖的sEMG到文本框架，使用CNN-BiLSTM-Attention模型进行手指分类，并使用T5 Transformer进行文本重构，在emg2qwerty数据集上实现了最先进的结果，并为无键盘文本输入提供了一条途径。
summary_zh: 表面肌电 (sEMG) 为解码肌肉活动提供了一种直接的神经接口，并为可穿戴和混合现实系统中的无键盘文本输入提供了一个有前景的基础。以往的sEMG文本转换研究主要集中于直接从sEMG信号中识别字母，这是将肌肉活动转化为文本的重要第一步。在此基础上，我们提出了 MyoText，一种通过生理关联的中间阶段将 sEMG 信号解码为文本的分层框架。MyoText 首先使用 CNN-BiLSTM-Attention 模型从多通道 sEMG 中分类手指激活，应用符合人体工程学的打字先验知识来推断字母，并使用微调的 T5 Transformer 重建完整的句子。这种模块化设计反映了打字的自然层次结构，将肌肉意图与语言输出联系起来，并减少了解码的搜索空间。在 emg2qwerty 数据集上对 30 名用户进行评估，MyoText 的性能优于基线模型，达到了 85.4% 的手指分类准确率、5.4% 的字符错误率 (CER) 和 6.5% 的词错误率 (WER)。 除了准确性的提高，这种方法还建立了一条从神经肌肉信号到文本的原则性途径，为完全无需物理键盘的虚拟和增强现实打字界面提供了一个蓝图。通过将符合工程学结构设计与基于 Transformer 的语言推理相结合，MyoText 提高了未来普及计算环境中无缝、可穿戴神经输入的可行性。

title: RadioDiff-Flux: Efficient Radio Map Construction via Generative Denoise Diffusion Model Trajectory Midpoint Reuse
summary: Accurate radio map (RM) construction is essential to enabling environment-aware and adaptive wireless communication. However, in future 6G scenarios characterized by high-speed network entities and fast-changing environments, it is very challenging to meet real-time requirements. Although generative diffusion models (DMs) can achieve state-of-the-art accuracy with second-level delay, their iterative nature leads to prohibitive inference latency in delay-sensitive scenarios. In this paper, by uncovering a key structural property of diffusion processes: the latent midpoints remain highly consistent across semantically similar scenes, we propose RadioDiff-Flux, a novel two-stage latent diffusion framework that decouples static environmental modeling from dynamic refinement, enabling the reuse of precomputed midpoints to bypass redundant denoising. In particular, the first stage generates a coarse latent representation using only static scene features, which can be cached and shared across similar scenarios. The second stage adapts this representation to dynamic conditions and transmitter locations using a pre-trained model, thereby avoiding repeated early-stage computation. The proposed RadioDiff-Flux significantly reduces inference time while preserving fidelity. Experiment results show that RadioDiff-Flux can achieve up to 50 acceleration with less than 0.15% accuracy loss, demonstrating its practical utility for fast, scalable RM generation in future 6G networks.
tldr: The paper introduces RadioDiff-Flux, a two-stage diffusion model framework for efficient radio map construction in 6G networks. It leverages precomputed latent space midpoints of diffusion processes for significant acceleration with minimal accuracy loss.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了RadioDiff-Flux，一个用于在6G网络中有效构建无线电地图的两阶段扩散模型框架。 它利用扩散过程的预计算潜在空间中点，从而在最小的精度损失下实现了显著加速。
summary_zh: 准确的无线电地图(RM)构建对于实现环境感知和自适应无线通信至关重要。然而，在未来以高速网络实体和快速变化的环境为特征的6G场景中，满足实时性要求极具挑战性。虽然生成式扩散模型(DMs)可以达到最先进的精度并仅有秒级延迟，但其迭代性质导致在对延迟敏感的场景中推理延迟过高。在本文中，通过揭示扩散过程的一个关键结构特性：潜在中点在语义相似场景中保持高度一致，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段潜在扩散框架RadioDiff-Flux，它将静态环境建模与动态细化解耦，从而能够复用预先计算的中点来绕过冗余去噪。具体而言，第一阶段仅使用静态场景特征生成粗略的潜在表示，该表示可以被缓存并在相似场景中共享。第二阶段使用预训练的模型将此表示适应于动态条件和发射机位置，从而避免了重复的早期阶段计算。所提出的RadioDiff-Flux显著减少了推理时间，同时保留了保真度。实验结果表明，RadioDiff-Flux能够实现高达50倍的加速，而精度损失小于0.15%，证明了其在未来6G网络中用于快速、可扩展的RM生成的实用性。

title: AMC26: High-performance DOb for robust position control
summary: This paper presents a new HPDOb that significantly improves disturbance estimation accuracy and robustness in motion control systems, surpassing the capabilities of conventional DObs. The proposed observer is analysed and synthesised in the discrete-time domain, providing a realistic representation of their dynamic behaviour and enabling enhanced controller design for practical applications. The core contribution of the HPDOb is a novel synthesis method that incorporates higher-order truncation error dynamics into disturbance estimation. Unlike conventional DObs, which are limited to zero-order truncation error, the HPDOb achieves first-order truncation error, yielding markedly improved estimation accuracy and robustness against disturbances in motion control systems. Simulation and experiments verify the stability and performance of HPDOb.
tldr: This paper introduces a High-Performance Disturbance Observer (HPDOb) that enhances disturbance estimation accuracy and robustness in motion control systems by incorporating higher-order truncation error dynamics, as validated through simulations and experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种高性能扰动观测器（HPDOb），通过将高阶截断误差动力学纳入其中，提高了运动控制系统中扰动估计的准确性和鲁棒性，并通过仿真和实验验证了其有效性。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新型高精度扰动观测器（HPDOb），它显著提高了运动控制系统中扰动估计的精度和鲁棒性，超越了传统扰动观测器（DObs）的能力。所提出的观测器在离散时间域中进行分析和综合，从而能真实地表示其动态行为，并为实际应用提供增强的控制器设计。HPDOb的核心贡献在于一种将高阶截断误差动态纳入扰动估计的新型综合方法。与限于零阶截断误差的传统DObs不同，HPDOb实现了的一阶截断误差，从而在运动控制系统中显著提高了对扰动的估计精度和鲁棒性。仿真和实验验证了HPDOb的稳定性和性能。

title: A framework for assuring the accuracy and fidelity of an AI-enabled Digital Twin of en route UK airspace
summary:
Digital Twins combine simulation, operational data and Artificial Intelligence (AI), and have the potential to bring significant benefits across the aviation industry. Project Bluebird, an industry-academic collaboration, has developed a probabilistic Digital Twin of en route UK airspace as an environment for training and testing AI Air Traffic Control (ATC) agents. There is a developing regulatory landscape for this kind of novel technology. Regulatory requirements are expected to be application specific, and may need to be tailored to each specific use case.
  We draw on emerging guidance for both Digital Twin development and the use of Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning (AI/ML) in Air Traffic Management (ATM) to present an assurance framework. This framework defines actionable goals and the evidence required to demonstrate that a Digital Twin accurately represents its physical counterpart and also provides sufficient functionality across target use cases. It provides a structured approach for researchers to assess, understand and document the strengths and limitations of the Digital Twin, whilst also identifying areas where fidelity could be improved. Furthermore, it serves as a foundation for engagement with stakeholders and regulators, supporting discussions around the regulatory needs for future applications, and contributing to the emerging guidance through a concrete, working example of a Digital Twin.
  The framework leverages a methodology known as Trustworthy and Ethical Assurance (TEA) to develop an assurance case. An assurance case is a nested set of structured arguments that provides justified evidence for how a top-level goal has been realised. In this paper we provide an overview of each structured argument and a number of deep dives which elaborate in more detail upon particular arguments, including the required evidence, assumptions and justifications.
tldr: This paper presents an assurance framework, leveraging the Trustworthy and Ethical Assurance (TEA) methodology, for an AI-enabled Digital Twin representing UK airspace, focusing on accuracy, fidelity and regulatory compliance for training AI ATC agents.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个保障框架，该框架利用可信和伦理保障（TEA）方法，为代表英国空域的AI数字孪生提供保障，重点关注训练AI空中交通管制（ATC）代理的准确性、保真度和法规遵从性。
summary_zh:
数字孪生融合了仿真、运行数据和人工智能(AI)，有望为航空业带来显著效益。“蓝鸟”项目是一个行业-学术合作项目，开发了英国航路空域的概率数字孪生，作为训练和测试AI空中交通管制(ATC)代理的环境。针对此类新兴技术，监管环境正在发展。监管要求预计是特定于应用的，并且可能需要根据每个具体的用例进行定制。

我们借鉴数字孪生开发和人工智能/机器学习(AI/ML)在空中交通管理(ATM)中的应用的新兴指南，提出了一个保障框架。该框架界定了可操作的目标以及所需的证据，以证明数字孪生能够准确地代表其物理对应物，并在目标用例中提供足够的功能。它为研究人员提供了一种结构化的方法，用于评估、理解和记录数字孪生的优势和局限性，同时识别可以提高保真度的领域。此外，它为与利益相关者和监管机构的互动奠定了基础，支持围绕未来应用的监管需求进行讨论，并通过一个具体的、可工作的数字孪生示例为新兴指南做出贡献。

该框架利用一种名为可信赖和伦理保障(TEA)的方法来开发保障案例。保障案例是一组嵌套的结构化论证，它为如何实现顶级目标提供了经证实的证据。在本文中，我们概述了每个结构化论证，并对一些特定论证进行了深入研究，包括所需的证据、假设和论证。

title: Explainable Fuzzy GNNs for Leak Detection in Water Distribution Networks
summary: Timely leak detection in water distribution networks is critical for conserving resources and maintaining operational efficiency. Although Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) excel at capturing spatial-temporal dependencies in sensor data, their black-box nature and the limited work on graph-based explainable models for water networks hinder practical adoption. We propose an explainable GNN framework that integrates mutual information to identify critical network regions and fuzzy logic to provide clear, rule-based explanations for node classification tasks. After benchmarking several GNN architectures, we selected the generalized graph convolution network (GENConv) for its superior performance and developed a fuzzy-enhanced variant that offers intuitive explanations for classified leak locations. Our fuzzy graph neural network (FGENConv) achieved Graph F1 scores of 0.889 for detection and 0.814 for localization, slightly below the crisp GENConv 0.938 and 0.858, respectively. Yet it compensates by providing spatially localized, fuzzy rule-based explanations. By striking the right balance between precision and explainability, the proposed fuzzy network could enable hydraulic engineers to validate predicted leak locations, conserve human resources, and optimize maintenance strategies. The code is available at github.com/pasqualedem/GNNLeakDetection.
tldr: The paper proposes an explainable Fuzzy Graph Neural Network (FGENConv) for leak detection in water distribution networks, balancing performance with rule-based explanations to aid hydraulic engineers.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种可解释的模糊图神经网络（FGENConv），用于检测配水网络中的泄漏，通过权衡性能和基于规则的解释来帮助水利工程师。
summary_zh: 水分配管网中的及时泄漏检测对于节约资源和维持运营效率至关重要。虽然图神经网络（GNN）擅长捕捉传感器数据中的时空依赖性，但它们的黑盒本质以及针对水网络基于图的可解释模型的有限研究阻碍了实际应用。我们提出了一个可解释的GNN框架，该框架集成了互信息以识别关键网络区域，并使用模糊逻辑为节点分类任务提供清晰的、基于规则的解释。在对几种GNN架构进行基准测试后，我们选择了广义图卷积网络（GENConv），因为它具有卓越的性能，并开发了一种模糊增强变体，为分类的泄漏位置提供直观的解释。我们的模糊图神经网络（FGENConv）在检测方面实现了0.889的Graph F1分数，在定位方面实现了0.814的Graph F1分数，略低于Crisp GENConv的0.938和0.858。然而，它通过提供空间定位的、基于模糊规则的解释来弥补这一点。通过在精度和可解释性之间取得适当的平衡，所提出的模糊网络能够使水力工程师验证预测的泄漏位置，节省人力资源，并优化维护策略。代码可在github.com/pasqualedem/GNNLeakDetection上获得。

title: Flow Matching and Diffusion Models via PointNet for Generating Fluid Fields on Irregular Geometries
summary: We present two novel generative geometric deep learning frameworks, termed Flow Matching PointNet and Diffusion PointNet, for predicting fluid flow variables on irregular geometries by incorporating PointNet into flow matching and diffusion models, respectively. In these frameworks, a reverse generative process reconstructs physical fields from standard Gaussian noise conditioned on unseen geometries. The proposed approaches operate directly on point-cloud representations of computational domains (e.g., grid vertices of finite-volume meshes) and therefore avoid the limitations of pixelation used to project geometries onto uniform lattices. In contrast to graph neural network-based diffusion models, Flow Matching PointNet and Diffusion PointNet do not exhibit high-frequency noise artifacts in the predicted fields. Moreover, unlike such approaches, which require auxiliary intermediate networks to condition geometry, the proposed frameworks rely solely on PointNet, resulting in a simple and unified architecture. The performance of the proposed frameworks is evaluated on steady incompressible flow past a cylinder, using a geometric dataset constructed by varying the cylinder's cross-sectional shape and orientation across samples. The results demonstrate that Flow Matching PointNet and Diffusion PointNet achieve more accurate predictions of velocity and pressure fields, as well as lift and drag forces, and exhibit greater robustness to incomplete geometries compared to a vanilla PointNet with the same number of trainable parameters.
tldr: This paper introduces Flow Matching PointNet and Diffusion PointNet, two novel geometric deep learning frameworks for fluid flow prediction on irregular geometries, outperforming vanilla PointNet and avoiding issues of other GNN methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Flow Matching PointNet和Diffusion PointNet，两种新颖的几何深度学习框架，用于预测不规则几何形状上的流体流动。它们优于普通的PointNet，并避免了其他GNN方法的问题。
summary_zh: 我们提出了两种新颖的生成式几何深度学习框架，分别称为Flow Matching PointNet和Diffusion PointNet，通过将PointNet分别融入流匹配模型和扩散模型，用于预测不规则几何体上的流体流动变量。在这些框架中，逆向生成过程从标准高斯噪声中重构物理场，并以未见过的几何体为条件。所提出的方法直接作用于计算域的点云表示（例如，有限体积网格的网格顶点），因此避免了用于将几何体投影到均匀格点上的像素化限制。与基于图神经网络的扩散模型相比，Flow Matching PointNet和Diffusion PointNet在预测场中没有表现出高频噪声伪影。此外，与需要辅助中间网络来限定几何形状的方法不同，所提出的框架仅依赖于PointNet，从而形成了一个简单而统一的架构。我们在稳态不可压缩流流经圆柱体的案例上评估了所提出框架的性能，使用一个几何数据集，该数据集通过改变样本中圆柱体的截面形状和方向来构建。结果表明，与具有相同可训练参数数量的普通PointNet相比，Flow Matching PointNet和Diffusion PointNet实现了更精确的速度场和压力场预测，以及升力和阻力预测，并在不完整几何体的情况下表现出更强的鲁棒性。

title: HybridSolarNet: A Lightweight and Explainable EfficientNet-CBAM Architecture for Real-Time Solar Panel Fault Detection
summary: Manual inspections for solar panel systems are a tedious, costly, and error-prone task, making it desirable for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) based monitoring. Though deep learning models have excellent fault detection capabilities, almost all methods either are too large and heavy for edge computing devices or involve biased estimation of accuracy due to ineffective learning techniques. We propose a new solar panel fault detection model called HybridSolarNet. It integrates EfficientNet-B0 with Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM). We implemented it on the Kaggle Solar Panel Images competition dataset with a tight split-before-augmentation protocol. It avoids leakage in accuracy estimation. We introduced focal loss and cosine annealing. Ablation analysis validates that accuracy boosts due to added benefits from CBAM (+1.53%) and that there are benefits from recognition of classes with imbalanced samples via focal loss. Overall average accuracy on 5-fold stratified cross-validation experiments on the given competition dataset topped 92.37% +/- 0.41 and an F1-score of 0.9226 +/- 0.39 compared to baselines like VGG19, requiring merely 16.3 MB storage, i.e., 32 times less. Its inference speed measured at 54.9 FPS with GPU support makes it a successful candidate for real-time UAV implementation. Moreover, visualization obtained from Grad-CAM illustrates that HybridSolarNet focuses on actual locations instead of irrelevant ones.
tldr: The paper introduces HybridSolarNet, a lightweight EfficientNet-CBAM architecture for real-time solar panel fault detection using UAVs, achieving high accuracy and inference speed with explainability, making it suitable for edge computing.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了HybridSolarNet，这是一种基于EfficientNet-CBAM的轻量级架构，用于使用无人机进行实时太阳能电池板故障检测，具有高精度、高推理速度和可解释性，使其适用于边缘计算。
summary_zh: 太阳能电池板系统的手动检查是一项繁琐、昂贵且容易出错的任务，因此基于无人机（UAV）的监测成为一种理想选择。尽管深度学习模型具有出色的故障检测能力，但几乎所有方法要么对于边缘计算设备来说过于庞大和笨重，要么由于学习技术效率低下而导致精度估计存在偏差。我们提出了一种新型的太阳能电池板故障检测模型，称为HybridSolarNet。它集成了EfficientNet-B0与卷积块注意力模块（CBAM）。我们在Kaggle太阳能电池板图像竞赛数据集上实施了该模型，并采用了严格的先分割后增强协议，避免了精度估计中的泄漏。我们引入了焦点损失和余弦退火。消融分析验证了由CBAM带来的额外好处可以提高准确率（+1.53%），并且通过焦点损失可以有效识别不平衡样本类别，从而带来收益。总的来说，在给定的竞赛数据集上进行5折分层交叉验证实验，其平均准确率达到92.37% +/- 0.41，F1分数为0.9226 +/- 0.39，优于VGG19等基线模型，同时仅需16.3 MB的存储空间，即减少了32倍。在GPU支持下测得其推理速度为54.9 FPS，使其成为实时无人机实施的成功候选者。此外，从Grad-CAM获得的 visualizations 表明，HybridSolarNet关注实际位置，而不是无关位置。

title: Textile IR: A Bidirectional Intermediate Representation for Physics-Aware Fashion CAD
summary: We introduce Textile IR, a bidirectional intermediate representation that connects manufacturing-valid CAD, physics-based simulation, and lifecycle assessment for fashion design. Unlike existing siloed tools where pattern software guarantees sewable outputs but understands nothing about drape, and physics simulation predicts behaviour but cannot automatically fix patterns, Textile IR provides the semantic glue for integration through a seven-layer Verification Ladder -- from cheap syntactic checks (pattern closure, seam compatibility) to expensive physics validation (drape simulation, stress analysis). The architecture enables bidirectional feedback: simulation failures suggest pattern modifications; material substitutions update sustainability estimates in real time; uncertainty propagates across the pipeline with explicit confidence bounds. We formalise fashion engineering as constraint satisfaction over three domains and demonstrate how Textile IR's scene-graph representation enables AI systems to manipulate garments as structured programs rather than pixel arrays. The framework addresses the compound uncertainty problem: when measurement errors in material testing, simulation approximations, and LCA database gaps combine, sustainability claims become unreliable without explicit uncertainty tracking. We propose six research priorities and discuss deployment considerations for fashion SMEs where integrated workflows reduce specialised engineering requirements. Key contribution: a formal representation that makes engineering constraints perceptible, manipulable, and immediately consequential -- enabling designers to navigate sustainability, manufacturability, and aesthetic tradeoffs simultaneously rather than discovering conflicts after costly physical prototyping.
tldr: This paper introduces Textile IR, a bidirectional intermediate representation for fashion CAD that integrates manufacturing, simulation, and lifecycle assessment, enabling AI to manipulate garments as structured programs and address uncertainty in sustainability claims.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为 Textile IR 的双向中间表示，用于服装 CAD，它集成了制造、模拟和生命周期评估，使 AI 能够将服装作为结构化程序进行操作，并解决可持续性声明中的不确定性。
summary_zh: 我们引入了 Textile IR，一种双向中间表示，用于连接服装设计的制造有效 CAD、基于物理的仿真和生命周期评估。与现有孤立的工具不同，这些工具中，纸样软件保证可缝合的输出，但对悬垂感一无所知；物理仿真预测行为，但无法自动修复纸样， Textile IR 通过一个七层验证阶梯（从廉价的语法检查（纸样闭合、缝合线兼容性）到昂贵的物理验证（悬垂仿真、应力分析））为集成提供语义粘合剂。该架构支持双向反馈：仿真失败提示纸样修改；材料替代实时更新可持续性评估；不确定性通过显式置信界限在整个流程中传播。我们将服装工程形式化为三个领域上的约束满足问题，并展示了 Textile IR 的场景图表示如何使 AI 系统能够将服装作为结构化程序而不是像素阵列进行操作。该框架解决了复合不确定性问题：当材料测试中的测量误差、仿真近似和 LCA 数据库差距结合时，如果没有显式的不确定性跟踪，可持续性声明将变得不可靠。我们提出了六个研究重点，并讨论了针对时装中小企业的部署考虑因素，其中集成的工作流程减少了专业工程需求。主要贡献：一种形式化表示，使工程约束可感知、可操作且立即产生后果——使设计师能够同时驾驭可持续性、可制造性和美学权衡，而不是在代价高昂的物理原型制作后才发现冲突。

title: Domain Generalization for Time Series: Enhancing Drilling Regression Models for Stick-Slip Index Prediction
summary: This paper provides a comprehensive comparison of domain generalization techniques applied to time series data within a drilling context, focusing on the prediction of a continuous Stick-Slip Index (SSI), a critical metric for assessing torsional downhole vibrations at the drill bit. The study aims to develop a robust regression model that can generalize across domains by training on 60 second labeled sequences of 1 Hz surface drilling data to predict the SSI. The model is tested in wells that are different from those used during training. To fine-tune the model architecture, a grid search approach is employed to optimize key hyperparameters. A comparative analysis of the Adversarial Domain Generalization (ADG), Invariant Risk Minimization (IRM) and baseline models is presented, along with an evaluation of the effectiveness of transfer learning (TL) in improving model performance. The ADG and IRM models achieve performance improvements of 10% and 8%, respectively, over the baseline model. Most importantly, severe events are detected 60% of the time, against 20% for the baseline model. Overall, the results indicate that both ADG and IRM models surpass the baseline, with the ADG model exhibiting a slight advantage over the IRM model. Additionally, applying TL to a pre-trained model further improves performance. Our findings demonstrate the potential of domain generalization approaches in drilling applications, with ADG emerging as the most effective approach.
tldr: This paper explores domain generalization techniques (ADG, IRM, TL) for predicting the Stick-Slip Index in drilling, showing ADG outperforms IRM and a baseline model, particularly in detecting severe events.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了领域泛化技术（ADG、IRM、TL）在钻井中预测粘滑指数的应用，结果表明ADG优于IRM和基线模型，尤其是在检测严重事件方面。
summary_zh: 本文对领域泛化技术在钻井领域时间序列数据中的应用进行了全面比较，重点关注连续粘滑指数（SSI）的预测。该指数是评估钻头处扭转井下振动的关键指标。本研究旨在开发一种稳健的回归模型，通过在标记的60秒1Hz地面钻井数据序列上进行训练来预测SSI，从而实现跨领域的泛化。该模型在不同于训练井的井中进行测试。为了微调模型架构，采用网格搜索方法来优化关键超参数。文中对对抗领域泛化（ADG）、不变风险最小化（IRM）和基线模型进行了比较分析，并评估了迁移学习（TL）在提高模型性能方面的有效性。与基线模型相比，ADG和IRM模型分别实现了10%和8%的性能提升。最重要的是，严重事件的检出率从基线模型的20%提高到60%。总而言之，结果表明ADG和IRM模型均优于基线模型，其中ADG模型略优于IRM模型。此外，将TL应用于预训练模型可进一步提高性能。研究结果表明，领域泛化方法在钻井应用中具有潜力，其中ADG成为最有效的方法。
